title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, push, list models via simple async/sync API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node & browsers (via proxy).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models for chat, tools, embeddings, and retrieval.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, streaming chat, embeddings.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama; simple interface to chat, generate, pull, list models.

title: ollama-cli-crystal
summary: Crystal-lang CLI and library for Ollama; fast binary, colorized REPL.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images for Ollama server (GPU & CPU) with docker-compose examples.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Next.js chatbot template with Ollama backend, streaming, markdown, and dark mode.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models using slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama; supports threads, ephemeral messages, and model selection.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir client for Ollama with GenServer streaming and Phoenix LiveView examples.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama API.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for reproducible Ollama builds on Linux/macOS with GPU drivers.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package to integrate Ollama into mobile/desktop apps.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library for Ollama with async I/O and build.zig integration.

title: ollama-hass-addon
summary: Home Assistant add-on to run Ollama locally and expose LLM services to automations.
